tasks.label: qmake: Configure
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path build; Set-Location build; & "$env:QTDIR/bin/qmake.exe" ../agcCh10toCSV.pro -spec win32-g++ CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=qml_debug

tasks.label: Build (Debug)
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "${workspaceFolder}/build"; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/build"; if (!(Test-Path Makefile)) { & "$env:QTDIR/bin/qmake.exe" ../agcCh10toCSV.pro -spec win32-g++ CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=qml_debug }; & "$env:MINGW_DIR/bin/mingw32-make.exe" -f Makefile.Debug

tasks.label: Build (Release)
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "${workspaceFolder}/build"; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/build"; if (!(Test-Path Makefile)) { & "$env:QTDIR/bin/qmake.exe" ../agcCh10toCSV.pro -spec win32-g++ CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=qml_debug }; & "$env:MINGW_DIR/bin/mingw32-make.exe" -f Makefile.Release

tasks.label: Force Build (Debug)
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "${workspaceFolder}/build"; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/build"; if (!(Test-Path Makefile)) { & "$env:QTDIR/bin/qmake.exe" ../agcCh10toCSV.pro -spec win32-g++ CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=qml_debug }; Get-ChildItem ../src,../include -Recurse -Include *.cpp,*.h | ForEach-Object { $_.LastWriteTime = Get-Date }; & "$env:MINGW_DIR/bin/mingw32-make.exe" -f Makefile.Debug
